expectations.text: No bare useStore() — all store access uses selectors
expectations.evidence: All components use exported selector hooks: useActiveFilter(), useSetFilter(). No bare useTaskFilterStore() calls.

expectations.text: Server data fetched via useQuery, not useState+useEffect+fetch
expectations.evidence: useTasks() hook uses useQuery with queryKey: taskKeys.list(). 5 useQuery occurrences found.

expectations.text: Mutations use useMutation with onSuccess invalidation
expectations.evidence: useCreateTask() and useToggleTask() both use useMutation with invalidateQueries(taskKeys.lists()) in onSuccess.

expectations.text: Query keys follow [domain, action, params] pattern
expectations.evidence: taskKeys factory: all=['tasks'], lists()=[...all,'list'], list(filters)=[...lists(),filters], details()=[...all,'detail'], detail(id)=[...details(),id]

expectations.text: Derived state computed in selectors, not stored
expectations.evidence: Filtered tasks computed via useMemo in TaskList.tsx, not stored in Zustand. No stored totalCount or activeCount.
useTaskFilterStore has initialState extracted and reset() action that restores it.

expectations.text: Proper state colocation: server data in TQ, UI state in Zustand/URL
expectations.evidence: Tasks in TanStack Query cache (useTasks hook). Filter selection in Zustand (useTaskFilterStore). Clear separation.
12 data-testid occurrences: task-item-{id}, task-item-{id}-toggle, task-filters-{value}, create-task-form, etc.
